prompt: Create a highly detailed cinematic vertical fashion poster featuring HANIA AI as oversized 3D orange typography behind the subject. A stylish young woman sits confidently on a square concrete cube block in a modern studio, centered slightly right, leaning forward with one elbow on her knee and her hand near her chin. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft square privacy blur. She has dark wavy hair pulled back loosely, wears subtle earrings, a silver necklace, and a silver wristwatch. Outfit: a luxury bright orange zip-up tracksuit with exactly 2 white side stripes running down the sleeves and pants, a plain white inner shirt, and clean white low-top sneakers. Background: dark teal-gray textured studio wall and glossy dark floor with soft reflections. Typography: huge extruded block letters in vivid orange with beveled edges and realistic shadows, spelling “HANIA” across the top and “AI” as giant letters on the left behind the model; add faint repeated outline text on the right reading exactly “FOLLOW 4 MORE” in 4 stacked repetitions. Add a circular logo stamp at the bottom left: orange “HA” monogram inside a circle, surrounded by small white circular text reading “LEADING THE FUTURE” and “HANIA AI REVOLUTION.” Lighting should be dramatic and cinematic, with strong directional highlights on the orange letters, realistic shadows, metallic edge glints, shallow depth of field, premium advertising-poster finish, ultra sharp fabric detail, concrete texture, and reflective floor glow. Use a vertical 2:3 poster composition, no extra people, no extra objects, no watermark beyond the described logo stamp.
